nodes.title: Lumina Fine Jewelry
nodes.heroSubtitle: Fine Jewelry Crafted with Passion Since 2001

heroDescription.processed: Discover exquisite jewelry that captures light and imagination. Each Lumina piece is a testament to artistry, quality, and the enduring beauty of precious materials, handcrafted by master artisans in our New York atelier.

description.processed: Each piece is meticulously handcrafted by master artisans with decades of experience.
We source only conflict-free diamonds and responsibly mined gemstones.
Work with our designers to create a one-of-a-kind piece that tells your story.
Every Lumina piece comes with our comprehensive lifetime warranty and care program.
All diamonds are GIA certified, ensuring quality and authenticity.
Every piece arrives in our signature luxury packaging, ready to gift.

ctaDescription.processed: From engagement rings to statement necklaces, explore our collections and discover jewelry that speaks to your unique style. Schedule a private consultation for a personalized experience.
